title: pinus caribaea var. hondurensis
intro: Pinus caribaea var. hondurensis, also known as Caribbean pine, is a variety of pine tree native to the tropical regions of Central America and the Caribbean. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pinus caribaea var. hondurensis include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
